dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.loading: Checking Local Supabase, upload state, and state store...

failed_retry.label: Failed files
failed_retry.empty: No failed files in the latest job.

risky.label: Job warnings
risky.empty: No warnings recorded for the latest job.

supabase_unreachable.label: Runtime gate
supabase_unreachable.impact: Local Supabase core runtime is not reachable.
supabase_unreachable.empty: Runtime gate is not blocking Dashboard review.

dashboard.error: Dashboard status could not be loaded.

noJob.title: No upload job recorded
noJob.message: Dashboard is connected to API mode, but no persisted upload job exists in the active state store.

ready.title: Upload ready
ready.message: Supabase, State Store, and WSL storage are ready. No blocking items found.

attention.title: Needs attention
attention.message: There are partial overlaps or retryable failures. Check Upload Preview.

blocked.title: Upload blocked
blocked.message: Upload start is blocked because Local Supabase is not responding.

messages.noPersistedUploadJob: No persisted upload job found in the active state store.
messages.developmentUploadRunningDetail: Development upload scenario is running. This is not an operator job.

placeholder.upload: The Upload screen is being prepared. Check the Dashboard for current status.
placeholder.logs: The Logs screen is being prepared. Check the Dashboard for recent failures and audit summary.
placeholder.settings: The Settings screen is being prepared. Check the Dashboard for local runtime status.

runtime.error: Local Supabase runtime status could not be loaded.

actions.startingDetail: Processing the Local Supabase start request and checking status again.
actions.stoppingDetail: Processing the Local Supabase stop request and verifying port shutdown.
actions.operationActive: A runtime operation is already active.
actions.alreadyStopped: Local Supabase containers are already stopped.
actions.nonCoreAttention: Core runtime is already ready. Grafana or Vector attention is a non-core observability caveat.
actions.requiredContainerMissing: Required containers are missing. v1 does not create a new stack.

observability.vectorCaveat: {{detail}} Non-core observability caveat only; core upload is not blocked when API, DB, Edge, Preview, and Audit are normal.

reason.ready: Local Supabase core runtime is ready.
reason.core_runtime_unreachable: Local Supabase API, DB, Studio, or Edge is stopped or unreachable. This is a blocked local Supabase core runtime, not a Web Console backend failure.
reason.non_core_runtime_attention: Core runtime is ready. Grafana or Vector attention is a non-core observability caveat.
reason.docker_unreachable: Docker is not reachable from the backend process.

editor.title: Save Settings
editor.subtitle: Edit only values that can be written to config JSON. Environment-overridden values are read-only.
editor.apiModeRequired: Development mode shows sample values only. API mode reads the active /api/config source and is required for real settings.

folders.title: Folders
folders.subtitle: Local source locations used by preview and upload.

connection.title: Connection
connection.subtitle: Local Supabase, Edge, and Grafana connection settings.

runtime.title: Runtime
runtime.subtitle: Settings used to inspect and control the configured Local Supabase stack.

save.success: Saved {{count}} settings and recorded a settings.save audit row.

reason.config_validation_failed: One or more values failed validation: {{keys}}
reason.config_request_validation_failed: The save request shape is invalid.
reason.config_empty_update: There are no changed values to save.
reason.config_file_invalid: The local config file is not valid JSON.
reason.config_write_failed: The local config file could not be written.
reason.local_token_required: Local console session is not valid. Open the console from the tray or restart it from the launcher.
reason.local_token_missing: Local console session is not connected. Open the console from the tray or restart it from the launcher.
reason.local_token_invalid: This browser tab is using an old local console session. Open the console from the tray or restart it from the launcher.

runtime.title: Local Runtime Settings
runtime.subtitle: Configuration used for local Supabase control.
runtime.error: Runtime settings could not be loaded.
runtime.unavailable: Runtime config is unavailable until the backend runtime API is reachable.
runtime.supportedCommands: Status check, start, and stop are supported.
runtime.commandPolicy: Advanced: only approved status/start/stop commands are available for the configured Local Supabase project.

preview.title: Upload Preview
preview.interimSummary: Interim counts from rows already processed. Final upload eligibility is available only after Preview succeeds.
preview.loading: Checking local CSV files and DB reconciliation...
preview.error: Upload preview status could not be loaded.

actions.startUploadDisabledReason: Start Upload requires a succeeded preview with reachable DB and target rows.
actions.startUploadDisabledRunning: Preview is still calculating. Start Upload stays disabled until the final result succeeds.

startReview.title: Confirm target count before upload
startReview.warning: Continuing will create an upload job for {{files}} target files and {{rowsFormatted}} expected upload rows. Target physical rows, acceptedRows, and DB row-count delta are reviewed separately.
startReview.inputLabel: Type the target row count {{rows}} to confirm. Commas are allowed.

blocked.title: Upload start is blocked
blocked.previewStatus: The Preview is not succeeded yet.
blocked.dbStatus: The DB status must be reachable.
blocked.noTarget: There are no target files or target rows to upload.
blocked.risky: Resolve risky Preview rows before starting upload.

startReview.countSemantics: Expected upload rows is the target-only approval gate. Partial-overlap rows are excluded from Start Upload unless a later approved flow explicitly allows them. acceptedRows and the DB row-count delta are checked after execution and may differ from target physical rows.
startReview.partialBreakdown: Target physical/key breakdown is based on {{loaded}} of {{total}} loaded target files. Expected upload rows remains the confirmation gate.

previewMode.largeSourceNote: Automatic safe Preview budget. Upload still requires review and separate approval.

previewApproval.title: Preview approval scope
previewApproval.loading: Loading active config before Preview can start

range.folderAllNote: Preview-only folder scan. Checks top-level CSV candidates in the configured source folder; Start Upload still needs separate approval.

reason.db_no_match: No exact DB keys found. This file is an upload target.
reason.db_full_match: All exact timestamp/device_id keys already exist in DB.
reason.db_partial_match: Some exact keys already exist in DB. Excluded unless explicitly allowed later.
reason.source_not_configured: Preview source folder is not configured.
reason.source_missing: Preview source folder could not be reached.
reason.file_missing: File metadata could not be read.
reason.file_date_missing: File date could not be parsed from the filename.
reason.outside_date_range: File date is outside the selected Preview range.
reason.file_locked: File is locked by another process.
reason.schema_mismatch: CSV schema is incomplete. Timestamp or device_id could not be confirmed.
reason.file_unstable: File was modified inside the configured stability lag window.
reason.db_unreachable: Local Supabase DB could not be reached.
reason.timeout: Preview run exceeded the configured time limit.
reason.no_valid_keys: No valid timestamp/device_id keys were found.

empty.title: No preview run yet
empty.detail: Run Preview to compare local CSV files with local Supabase rows.
empty.noRows: No rows match the current filters.

job.title: Upload Job
job.placeholder: No upload job yet. Run Preview and start from target rows.
job.loadError: Upload job could not be loaded.

retryReview.title: Confirm retry target count
retryReview.warning: Retry Failed will create one retry job for {{rowsFormatted}} remaining physical rows from failed or interrupted files only.
retryReview.countSemantics: Retry job state does not contain Preview-level unique key, duplicate key, DB match, or deduped expected upload row counts. Review the approved Preview evidence before retrying; remaining physical rows is only the typed retry confirmation gate.
retryReview.inputLabel: Type the remaining physical row count {{rows}} to confirm. Commas are allowed.
retryReview.confirm: Retry failed upload for {{rowsFormatted}} remaining rows

blocked.title: Retry is blocked
blocked.noRetryFiles: There are no failed or interrupted files to retry.
blocked.noRows: There are no remaining physical rows to retry.

actions.preflightDisabled: Delete preflight requires a succeeded Preview, reachable DB, and only already-in-DB rows selected.
actions.apiModeRequired: Delete is available only in API mode.
actions.noSelection: Select already-in-DB rows before delete preflight.

dateScoped.title: Date-scoped delete review
dateScoped.blockedTitle: Date-scoped delete cannot start from this UI.
dateScoped.blockedDetail: This panel only verifies copy, i18n, runbook, and confirmation placement. It does not create a delete preflight, start a delete job, retry, save settings, or enable a feature gate.
dateScoped.disabledTitle: Date-scoped delete requires a separate policy, preflight, approval record, rollback evidence, and gate enablement.

delete.latestError: Latest delete job could not be loaded

review.title: Confirm already-in-DB hard delete
review.warning: Continuing will delete {{rowsFormatted}} exact DB rows from {{items}} already-in-DB Preview items. This does not upload or retry files.
review.countSemantics: The backend revalidates Preview freshness, file signatures, keyset hash, DB fingerprint, DELETE permission, and audit write before the transaction.
review.inputLabel: Type the exact row count {{rows}} to confirm. Commas are allowed.
review.ackNoUndo: I understand this is a hard delete with no in-app undo.
review.ackRollback: I understand rollback requires a fresh Preview and a separately approved Start Upload from unchanged source files.

reason.db_delete_permission_denied: The configured local DB user does not have DELETE privilege on public.all_metrics.
reason.audit_write_failed: Start audit write failed before DB mutation.
reason.delete_run_state_write_failed: Delete state could not be recorded before DB mutation.
reason.db_target_not_local: The configured DB target is not the expected local Supabase DB.
reason.db_target_changed: The DB fingerprint changed after preflight.
reason.db_key_count_mismatch: The DB row count changed after preflight.
reason.db_count_check_failed: The DB count check failed before delete.
reason.reconciliation_count_failed: The DB count check failed during delete reconciliation.
reason.selection_item_missing: A selected Preview item is no longer available.
reason.selection_contains_non_already_in_db: The delete selection contains rows that are not Already in DB.
reason.selection_status_changed: A selected Preview item changed status after preflight.
reason.file_signature_changed: A selected source file changed after preflight.
reason.keyset_mismatch: The source file signature or exact keyset changed after preflight.
reason.rollback_not_ready: Rollback readiness is not proven from the current source files.
reason.active_delete_job_exists: A delete job or unresolved delete recovery is already active.
reason.typed_delete_keys_mismatch: The typed row count does not match the preflight count.
reason.commit_unknown: Delete commit outcome is unknown and must be reconciled.

job.title: Job Logs
job.subtitle: Recent upload job events. Full job controls remain in the Upload screen.
job.error: Job logs could not be loaded.
job.mockMessage: Development job log row. Switch to API mode to read persisted job events.

audit.title: Audit Logs
audit.subtitle: Append-only operator actions, blocked operations, and background failures.
audit.error: Audit logs could not be loaded.
audit.empty: No audit logs match the current filters.
